entry.title: unable to enable multiple Adding Field Checks in charm via Focusbuild
entry.content:
Hi SAP

unable to enable multiple Adding Field Checks in charm via Focusbuild.

I can able to enable this check via mainiatining status transition consistency check -/SALM/CONS_CHECK.

Can you please help me to create mutiple Field checks via focusbuild
.

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud: EDI Configuration for Update/Cancel Pur...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please maintain Fields Relevant to Printouts of Change as shown in the SAP Blog:  https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/how-to-generate-purchase-order-output-on-change-of-a-purchase-order/ba-p/13689606.

When there is a change in the value of the field which are marked as print relevant, a new output should be issued. 

Best regards,

Meghana

entry.title: What's new in DTV 1.5
entry.content:
It’s a been a while since DTV 1.5 is released, and I am more than happy to share more information regarding the latest and greatest release of Data Transition Validation Tool.

Partial Execution

In DTV 1.5 partial execution of data simulation, extraction and evaluation is now enabled in work item level. In a real time, scenario, when we define multiple split parameters for greater granularity of data, execution of huge amount of data may lead to failures sometimes. With partial execution enablement, now users can execute simulation, extraction, and evaluation of individual failed work items instead of the whole test specification saving valuable time during business data evaluation in business down time.

Specify Maximum number of work processes

Whether it is Simulation, Extraction or Evaluation, DTV creates background jobs for processing and executing work items. For optimum system performance, now you can define dedicated number of work processes which can be utilized for DTV for background jobs, further finetuning the DTV overall performance.

You can do the setup in Maintain Systems -> Max. num of Processes.

Result Data

The entire result data of the reports including the hidden fields can now be seen in the Result Data making the analysis easy and intuitive for the end user.

Copy the project including the Test Specification

In DTV 1.5 you have the possibility to copy the project global data and the test specifications to further improve the usability of the tool.

 

Execution Runtime information is enhanced with delay time calculations

entry.title: From where in S4 can I find the SAC values for Rate types like average and closing (currency)?
entry.content:
I'm currently building a model in SAC where data is imported from S4. The dimensions used in the model are Profit Center, Cost Center, GL Account, and Company Code. 

As I need currency conversion in the model, I am wondering if I can obtain directly from the system the SAC type required for the currency conversion such as average or closing. 

For example I know that for GL Account, there is a specific property called SAC Account Type available in an API in S4 so that you can upload the data in SAC with the correct SAC type. Im wondering if there is something similar in terms of currency. 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order Process Control
entry.content:

Appreciate for your helping!

entry.title: SAP Build process automation - Document Template - Error
entry.content:
Hi,

We built a process using SAP Document Information Extraction Using Templates, and it worked fine.

Now we created new subaccount and we move our project there, but we are getting an error when we try to create/change/use a template.

The message is "SAP_IPA_28014: The requested Document Information Extraction service operation could not be completed. Call to Document Information Extraction failed with status 400 BAD_REQUEST.

I checked and I have the role collection ProcessAutomationDeveloper that contains the role Document_Information_Extraction_UI_Templates_Admin.

What else can be missing?

Thanks

SAP Build Process Automation , Document Information Extraction

entry.title: Production and Maintenance Order Settlement
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a question about Production and Maintenance Order Settlement. When I settle Production order with consumes I see also quantities that are settled in accounting document, while in Maintenance order, always with consumes this does not happen.

Is there any setting that I'm missing? Or this is the standard SAP behaviour?

Thank you,

Pietro

entry.title: Re: Equipment Status to INAC
entry.content:
Hi Preethialevarthi,

Equipment-Asset synchronization (by standard) can be done only for a predefined set of fields. In the IMG route: Financial Accounting -> Asset Accounting -> Master Data -> Automatic creation of equipment master records -> Assign Master Data fields of Assets and Equipment, you can find the fields that can be mapped.

Before this you have to map asset class with equipment category and give conditions in "Specify conditions for synchronization of Master Date" node.

If you want to synchronize more fields, you have to go with "Develop Enhancement for Field and Class Assignment" IMG node (Customer Enhancement: AAPM0001). It is recommended to only create a synchronization between data fields for which the following is true:

    • The fields are defined syntactically the same. (Not same in the case of INAC eqp. status and deletion of asset)
    • The fields are not primary or foreign keys.

Refer note : 370884 - PM-AA 4.6C: Consulting on sync activation + corrections - SAP for Me

Alternatively:
You can use the BADI: EQUI_UPDATE or User Exit: IEQM0003 to detect equipment status change to INAC (Status type code = 'I0320').

For updating the asset master record, you can use the functional module ASSET_MASTERRECORD_MAINTENANCE. Field for deletion flag: I_ANLA - XSPEB

Hope this answer gave you a brief overview to help your case.

Regards,
Ritesh PR

entry.title: Re: change withholding tax base amount in S4HC
Re: Customer exit SUSR0001 to log off invalid user
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

I removed the wait step and replaced FM TH_POPUP with POPUP_TO_INFORM. As you said, its showing the message and if the user clicks the green checkmark in the popup, he is logged off as I am calling the FM SYST_LOGOFF if sy-subrc eq 0.

But I see that the user still has the option to click the top left corner in the popup to open a new session and still login to SAP outside his shift hours as seen in the below image. 

Kindly let me know if its possible not to allow the user to take any backdoor entry like this to login to SAP.

Thanks

Bharath

entry.title: Re: change withholding tax base amount in S4HC
entry.content:
Please try follwing below steps.

In order to change Withholding Tax Code please follow the steps below:

  1. APP :Schedule Accounts Payable Jobs
  2. Click on + sign and choose the Job Template Recreate and Change Withholding Tax Data with 0% Withholding Tax Rate (RFWT0020)
  3. Input the needed parameters and press Schedule
    There is a checkbox Start Immediately - if checked, the report will be executed immediately.
    Also there is the checkbox for Test mode - so you can check the potential changes, before running the report in real mode and make changes to database entries.

entry.title: Re: ****HOW TO SHOW MONTHLY DATA IN DIFFERENT ROW WISE -...
entry.content:
3 different tables

Table 1 filtered for Jan-Apr

Table 2 filtered for May-Aug

Table 3 filtered for Sep-Dec

Use relative positioning for the 3 tables to make it look like it is one big table

regards

James

entry.title: I like, I wish
entry.content:
Dear course participants,

Your input helps us tremendously in shaping and improving our courses and the platform. This is why we ask all participants to share their thoughts after completing a course.

The “I like, I wish” method allows you to structure your feedback. If you’ve never used it before, see the following examples:

* “I like that the course content was broken down into smaller lessons”.
* “I wish I could log on to learning.sap.com with my LinkedIn credentials”.

Please try and use this approach to share your feedback with us. Although we can’t reply to these posts, we promise to read each and every suggestion and discuss them within the team.

Thank you for choosing SAP Learning!

Kind regards,
Britta Radicke-Schlinsog

(SAP Learning team)

entry.title: Re: Using Current Date Input Control in SAC Advanced Filters
entry.content: Have you tried API: Application.setCurrentDateTime();

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud: Newly Created Members Delay In S...
entry.content:
Hello - I have used the create member followed by a data action several times and have not encountered a delay. The data action is able to pick up the new member straight away within the same script without delay timers etc.

When the data action fails I've found instead it's caused by the syntax of the dimension member you are passing across. For example passing a member without a hierarchy you can just pass the ID, but if passing a member to the data action from script that is in a hierarchy, then you have to add the full technical hierarchy information around the ID like below:

var id = InputField_ID.getValue();

var id2 = "[DIMENSION].[H1].&["+id+"]"; // restate ID so that the Data Action can recognise this

..then id2 is passed to the DA

DataAction_1.setParameterValue("DIMENSION",id2);

Just want to check this is not the issue first as I've not experienced any delays before upon master data creation.

David

entry.title: Re: Report to update PGI status in SAP EWM
entry.content: If the goods issue status (DGI) on the outbound delivery (document category FDO) was set correctly in EWM, a typical root cause for the status 'Completion' (DCO) to be partially completed is that the status 'Transit Status' (DOY) was not set.

I am using basic credential of my service instance.

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Jayshree,

Relating to your ask about MRP integration and the document type needed for the Advanced Intercompany Stock Transfer (5HP) here the standard view is as follows.

The process of using MRP to generate Purchase Requisitions can be used also in conjunction with 5HP and specifically herein the special document type needed for the Stock Transfer Order (standard delivered one being NBIC).

In General it bears worth noting, that the Purchase Requisition Item generated from MRP for stock transfer cases will always be categorized to be of type "Stock Transfer" (named as "U" usually, internally referenced as item category 7). 

Thus, regardless of the new scenario 5HP, there is a difference between the Purchase Requisition Item Category and the Purchase Order Item Category in case of intercompany stock transfers.

So the topic is not at all new in any sense. 

What needs to be done is to tell the system, that there needs to be considered a conversion of item category during the PR-PO conversion (again, true for both "existing" intercompany stock transfer as well as for the new advanced intercompany stock transfer). 

This can be achieved via customizing of the Purchase Order Document Type NBIC. To be more precise, you can here from the document type "NBIC" select the allowed item category blank. There in turn you can go one step further, to link purchase requisitions. There you can reference the PR document type "NB" and PR item category "U". Thereby a conversion can consider that PR items of type NB/U are convertible into PO items of type "NBIC/blank".

Kind regards

Thomas Jürgensen

entry.title: Re: SAP UI5 PDF View doesn't work any more and have to do...
entry.content:
You need to set the parameter "isTrustedSource" to true.

In version 1.71.63 a new property "isTrustedSource" was introduced.:

[FIX] We've introduced the isTrustedSource property as a security enhancement for the PDFViewer control as detailed in the API reference

see API: https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.71.70/#/api/sap.m.PDFViewer/controlProperties

Parameter to determine if the given PDF is from a trusted source. If the source is valid this property can be set to true. If isTrustedSource is set to true, the PDFViewer opens with the displayType set to "Embedded" on desktop devices. This means that the PDF content is directly shown within the PDFViewer. Set this property to true only when the PDF is generated by the application or the PDF is scanned for viruses. If isTrustedSource is set to false, the PDFViewer opens with the displayType set to "Link" on desktop devices. This means that any configuration that has been provided by the application for the property displayType is overridden. In this case, the user would need to download the PDF to view its content.

entry.title: What is the added value to hide email & phone number in New People Profile > Spotlight ?
entry.content:
in the new people profile, the spotlight view is no longer displaying email address & phone number.

I would like to know what was the rational on sap side to do so ? 

on pc, these is causing the default mail program to be opened when clicking on email.

on mobile, it's the same, it's opening the default email program.

it's no longer easy to copy / paste email address & phone number from spotlight.

so i would like to understand what lead for such dramatic change.

entry.title: Re: Service Order with Resource-related Intercompany Billing
entry.content:

I got one question regarding the "Service Parts": You are mentioning that "Service Parts" are not yet supported for intercompany processes. In detail, service technicians from the supplying company code cannot confirm service parts from their own stock (= supplying company code). However, this feature is highly requested by one of my customers. Can you provide information on when this feature will be available on S/4HANA Private Cloud?

entry.title: Planning Table for 2 or more workcenters (repetitive manufacturing
entry.content:
Hi 

SAP S/4HANA Public cloud.

I have a customer who can produce the sale product on 2 or 3 production lines.

I would like to use Repetitive manufacturing, but I don't know how to show all 3 lines onthe Planning Board.

I have created different routings and versions.

Teoreticaly it shoud be easy to manupulate with line load per assignning different lines.

Is the any possibility to do so?

There is no WC Hierarchy in Public cloud.

Rgds

MAciej

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

That's it! We have reached the deadline for new applicants. I appreciate everyone who took the time to write and sign up for the digital skills initiative.

I have a huge backlog of completed learning journey requests to go through, so please bare with me as I verify each one. I will get to you within the next 2 weeks and send you your free certification attempt.

All applicants have until December 1 to submit their completed learning journey to qualify for a free certification attempt.

If you have arrived here after the deadline, see the bottom of this blog to understand how you can get started with learning SAP: Celebrating 2 Years of the Digital Skills Initiative

Thanks everyone!

@David_Chaviano 

Thanks Regards 

Mubeen.A

entry.title: Re: Setting status of equipment / functional location and...
entry.content:
Did you alread look at the (others) BAPI/API of function groups ITOB_BAPI_EQ Equipment and ITOB_BAPI_FL Func location?

  • There are BAPI for some system statuses: e.g. BAPI_EQUI_INSTALL, IBAPI_FUNCLOC_SET_INACTIVE
  • There are some BAPI for all user statuses e.g. IBAPI_EQUI_USERSTATUS_CHANGE, IBAPI_FUNCLOC_USERSTATUS_CHANG

Else which statuses did you try to set or reset?

entry.title: Re: how to add an attribute of a different type in advanc...
entry.content:
Hello @Alex,
In this case you need to have Product Code as field in your Customer Review Model. 

Reason being - Advance Search work on the type of the attribute which is there in the main model. In your case customerReview is the main model, hence the  product attribute which is of type productModel can only be used.

entry.title: Problem with Code Completion in Eclipse ATD
entry.content:
Hello all, the behavior of the eclipse when I am writing ABAP changed and I cannot find where.

Previously, when it suggest sth it was i a black box and if you wanted you press TAB or CTRL-SPACE to find sth else. Like the below picture.

From the weekend sth changed (most probably by me) and the behavior changed. The suggestion goes in line and the cursor at the end of the proposal, like the below picture.

 t is the letter i type and ype is the code completion.

Keep in mind that I am in the latest update of the Eclipse and I am using the DARK theme of Eclipse.

Please for your help as this behavior is very annoying.

Thanks

Elias

entry.title: Re: MB52
entry.content:
In principle

  • For S-price items, the revaluation amount is posted to a price difference account.
  • For V-price items, the revaluation amount is recorded in a price difference account or in an inventory account, depending on the base quantity.

Also read KBAs such as 2450893 - MR21/MR22: accounts in corresponding FI documents

entry.title: Re: How can I see the previous (moved developments) devel...
entry.content:
@raymond_giuseppi When I press the 'Fetch remote version' button in S4D (the system I develop on) and say bring the S4P (Live System) version, it brings the latest version in S4P. I want to see all versions in the S4P system. I want to see all versions, not the latest version in S4P (Live System).
Just as I can see all developments in S4D while in version management, I want to see all versions in S4P while in version management, but I can't. I can only see the latest development that was moved.
How can I see it in S4P while I can see it in S4D (the system I develop on)?

entry.title: Re: Applying for Digital Skills Initiative -for certification
entry.content:
Hi @ArchanaReddyV ,

Welcome aboard. Invite sent.

How to figure out if your certification / learning content is free of charge might be helpful for you.

entry.title: Re: Not getting option to configure Channel in iflow
entry.content: Deleting the sender and receiver then using drag and drop solved the problem for me. Thank you !

entry.title: Re: Enhancing Project Outcomes with SAP: Best Practices from a Project Manager's Perspective
entry.content:
Hi @Odysseas ,

Thank you for sharing!

Can you share some stories of the biggest challenges in projects that you have faced due to extraordinary technical or administrative problems? How were they solved?

entry.title: Re: Rerecording of dropdown menus or picklists in SAP Ena...
entry.content:
Hi Dirk,

Thank you for your answer.

Here is an example of dropdown menu I have recorded, but that I fail to rerecord:

In this example, I need successively to click on the entries "Goto", then "Header" to finally select “Sales”.

The rerecording tool fails to select these successive entries and close the drop-down menu after any interaction with the recording bar.

In this case, I need to execute the mouse actions. Is there a way to bypass this issue (without recording these actions manually)?

entry.title: Re: Application for Digital Skills Initiative: Irtaza Zaidi, SAP S/4HANA Production Planning
entry.content:
Hi @Irtazazaidi ,

Thanks for writing! What inspired you to pursue supply chain management?

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio Process Intelligence, Error: PREVIEW_FAILED
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for your question! I would like to ask you to open a support ticket in SAP for Me. The colleagues from Support will be able to analyze your specific case.

Thank you! Best regards,

Jessica

entry.title: Re: What's your hobby? What's your passion?
entry.content: Nice @sveabecker 😃 and a trip to Germany too!!

entry.title: Re: Trigger an outbound Idoc when a PR is created.
entry.content: Personally, I would have called the FM MASTER_IDOC_DISTRIBUTE in the POSTED method of the BAdI ME_REQ_POSTED, but that's the general idea.

entry.title: Buttons are disable in Form Template Maintenance after SDK 2411 upgrade
entry.content:
Dear Community

We noticed that after last week SDK 2411 upgrade, some of the form templates we working on are not able to perform some actions like [Upload, Copy, Action].  It was OK until last week with 2408 version.

We just use normal BU (no PDI users) to perform form template maintenance.

Anyone facing same issue?

[SAP Business ByDesign]

 

Regards,

May

entry.title: Re: Application for SAP Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Invite sent @MMAlam - please keep us posted on your progress.

What are some career opportunities that you hope will be unlocked with a certification in SAP?

entry.title: SSO Azure AD unauthorized issue
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I would like to set up SSO from Azure AD in my Datasphere.

I have set up everything from the Identity Provider (Azure AD) side.
and also have set everything in Datasphere.

But whenever I get to "Step 4: Confirm that the mapping is working."

I open the link in a new incognito tab and I sign in with SSO normally but then I get unauthorized.
which tells me that the SSO works but I still need authorization.

Can you please direct me the way I can solve this?

Best

Sam

tcodataspherefree.eu10.hcs.cloud.sap

entry.title: Re: Sneak Peek in to SAP Analytics Cloud release for Q4 2024
entry.content:
Hi @Orla_C,

unfortunately the what's new content is not visible to anyone who is on the QRC release schedule so from this point of view it's a huge step back to prepare for the release. In the old form we could always see detailed posts of upcoming features and prepare for them.

Best

Fabian

entry.title: Re: How can I see the previous (moved developments) devel...
entry.content: By default there is no version management in target system, so you only see the last imported version in this system.

entry.title: Re: Customer exit SUSR0001 to log off invalid user
entry.content: Why did you replace TH_POPUP? If you remove WAIT, the popup remains displayed in my system.

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP Analytics Cloud with Azure AD SAML
entry.content:
very interesting! Many thanks!

I have done this with SAC and it worked very good. But i am getting my data from datasphere, and it is still asking me to log in to datasphere to show the stories. Is there a way to tell SAC to not ask me to sign in  to datasphere but instead get the data automaticlly?

entry.title: Re: Talent intelligence hub - 2024 updates and behind the scenes!
entry.content:
Thanks for the interesting and useful blog! I have discussed the deployment of TIH with several potential clients. Often the major issue is that the manager view of the GP is limited to direct reports. Clients need a tool like executive review (similar organized like the executive review from compensation) to have an overview about all employee with their respective skills. Therefore, I have created an enhancement request:

Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence

entry.title: Re: Internal Server Error while trying to create Access Request using API
entry.content:
Hello Jerry,

Have you solved this issue? We are encountering the same issue in creating Access Request through API.
Could you please help?

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: Re: How to integrate 3rd party project management tools with SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Any customer reference so far?

thanks

entry.title: Re: Free Trials – Top 5 Picks of Students
entry.content:
Hi @HDM ,

A huge thank you for sharing these resources. It's important for newcomers who do not have access to SAP systems to get their hands on them in any way possible.

entry.title: Re: How can I see the previous (moved developments) devel...
entry.content: @yalcin_mete The versions are not transported by default. Back to the original answer then: "The transport of versions is controlled by the transport profile parameter VERS_AT_IMP (NEVER by default). For more information about VERS_AT_IMP: https://help.sap.com/docs/search?q=Global+Parameters"
